---
title: "triad_analysis"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source(file.path("analysis", "dataload.R"))
source(file.path("analysis", "analysis_helpers.R"))

```

```{r}
tri <- load_triad_conditions(outputs_dir = "final_outputs")
triad_df <- tri$conditions
triad_sweep_dir <- tri$sweep_dir

print_basic_checks(triad_df, keys = c("preset", "delta_omega_tri", "k_strong", "k_weak"))

triad_df %>% summarise(across(c(r_mean, plv_pairmean_mean, coalition_mean, leader_dom_mean), ~sum(is.na(.x))))

```

```{r}
# --- triad printed summaries (per preset) ---
triad_summaries <- triad_df %>%
  group_by(preset) %>%
  summarise(
    max_coalition = coalition_mean[which.max(coalition_mean)][1],
    max_coalition_dw = delta_omega_tri[which.max(coalition_mean)][1],
    max_coalition_kweak = k_weak[which.max(coalition_mean)][1],

    max_leader_dom = leader_dom_mean[which.max(leader_dom_mean)][1],
    max_leader_dw = delta_omega_tri[which.max(leader_dom_mean)][1],
    max_leader_kweak = k_weak[which.max(leader_dom_mean)][1],

    max_pairplv = plv_pairmean_mean[which.max(plv_pairmean_mean)][1],
    max_pairplv_dw = delta_omega_tri[which.max(plv_pairmean_mean)][1],
    max_pairplv_kweak = k_weak[which.max(plv_pairmean_mean)][1],

    min_coalition = coalition_mean[which.min(coalition_mean)][1],
    .groups = "drop"
  )

triad_summaries

```

```{r}
triad_df %>%
  group_by(preset) %>%
  summarise(
    best_coalition = max(coalition_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    best_leader_dom = max(leader_dom_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    best_pairplv = max(plv_pairmean_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  kable(digits = 3, caption = "Triad: per-preset maxima (tail-mean summaries)")
```

```{r}
# heatmaps faceted by preset (nice for paper)
p_coal <- ggplot(triad_df, aes(x = delta_omega_tri, y = k_weak, fill = coalition_mean)) +
  geom_tile() +
  facet_wrap(~preset) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(
    title = "Triad regime maps: coalition index",
    x = "Δω (fixed mismatch)", y = "k_weak", fill = "coalition_mean"
  ) +
  theme_thesis()

p_pairplv <- ggplot(triad_df, aes(x = delta_omega_tri, y = k_weak, fill = plv_pairmean_mean)) +
  geom_tile() +
  facet_wrap(~preset) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(
    title = "Triad regime maps: mean pairwise PLV",
    x = "Δω (fixed mismatch)", y = "k_weak", fill = "plv_pairmean_mean"
  ) +
  theme_thesis()

p_lead <- ggplot(triad_df, aes(x = delta_omega_tri, y = k_weak, fill = leader_dom_mean)) +
  geom_tile() +
  facet_wrap(~preset) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(
    title = "Triad regime maps: leader dominance",
    x = "Δω (fixed mismatch)", y = "k_weak", fill = "leader_dom_mean"
  ) +
  theme_thesis()

p_coal
p_pairplv
p_lead


```

```{r}

save_fig(p_coal,    "triad_faceted_coalition_mean.png", triad_sweep_dir, width = 9, height = 5)
save_fig(p_pairplv, "triad_faceted_plv_pairmean_mean.png", triad_sweep_dir, width = 9, height = 5)
save_fig(p_lead,    "triad_faceted_leader_dom_mean.png", triad_sweep_dir, width = 9, height = 5)
```
